stem:
d = 24t

The given equation represents the distance d, in feet, where t represents the number of seconds since an object started moving. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 24 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The object moved a total of 24 feet.
The object is moving at a rate of 24 feet per second.
The object moved a total of 24 t feet.
The object is moving at a rate of 1/24 feet per second.

rationale: Choice B is correct. In d = 24t, 24 is the rate, in feet per second.
